name: Marcus Aurelius
lastMessage: How much does the Standard plan cost for a team of 5?

messages.name: Marcus Aurelius
messages.message: Hi, I am looking to automate our lead distribution. Do you have a WhatsApp CRM solution?

messages.name: Pravesha AI Agent
messages.message: Hello Marcus! Yes, Pravesha AI includes a complete WhatsApp AI Agent integrated directly with our CRM to automate lead routing, task assignment, and customer inquiries. May I ask what business you represent?
messages.thoughts:
Step 1: Greet Marcus and confirm WhatsApp AI Agent functionality.
Step 2: Ask for business name to begin lead qualification process.

messages.name: Marcus Aurelius
messages.message: I run Rome Logistics. We have 5 sales reps. How much does the Standard plan cost?

agentThoughts: Step 1: Check if phone +1-555-0888 is an existing Customer or Lead. GetLead returned null. GetCustomer returned null. This is a NEW PROSPECT.
Step 2: Marcus provided company name: Rome Logistics, and team size: 5 sales reps. Budget is likely Standard plan ($99/mo).
Step 3: Run RAG search for pricing standard plan. Match found in kb-pricing-1: $99/mo, includes 3 active agents, 2,000 sessions.
Step 4: Execute CreateLead tool to register Marcus Aurelius under Rome Logistics.
Step 5: Formulate sales reply explaining pricing and suggesting lead generation.
suggestedReply:
The Standard Plan is $99/month and includes unlimited custom fields, 3 active AI Agents, and 2,000 WhatsApp sessions—perfect for a team of 5 reps! 

I have registered your details in our CRM. Would you like to schedule a quick 10-minute demo to see how we route leads automatically?

suggestedActions.title: Create Lead profile for Marcus
suggestedActions.description: Create a CRM Lead for Marcus Aurelius representing Rome Logistics.

name: Zenobia Pal
lastMessage: We are getting connection failed error on API logs.

messages.name: Zenobia Pal
messages.message: Hi, our CRM API is showing connection failed error codes in sync logs. Can you check?

agentThoughts: Step 1: Check caller phone +1-555-0442. Matches Customer Zenobia Pal of Palmyra Trade on Standard Plan.
Step 2: Search Knowledge Base for 'connection failed api sync error'. Match found in kb-guide-1: OAuth token renewal settings.
Step 3: Draft guide step instructions (re-authenticate in Settings > Integrations).
Step 4: Suggest creating a follow-up task ticket in the CRM to log the incident.
suggestedReply:
Hello Zenobia. I found your account details. This connection failed error usually occurs when the API OAuth sync token expires.

You can refresh this token easily in your dashboard:
1. Go to Settings > Integrations.
2. Click 'Re-authenticate' next to your CRM data source.

Let me know if this refreshes the connection!

suggestedActions.title: Log API Sync Error Incident
suggestedActions.description: Create a CRM developer task to monitor Zenobia Pal's API connection status.

name: Cleopatra Ptolemy
lastMessage: I want a refund for the chargeback discrepancy of $1200 immediately.

messages.name: Cleopatra Ptolemy
messages.message: I canceled the subscription 2 weeks ago and still got charged $1200. I want a refund issued immediately or I will contact my bank.

agentThoughts: Step 1: Check database. Customer is Cleopatra Ptolemy, Enterprise plan subscriber.
Step 2: User requests a refund of $1200 due to cancellation issues. Financial dispute exceeds the $500 support rep limit.
Step 3: Support SOP kb-sop-2 dictates that disputes exceeding $500 must be routed directly to human billing managers.
Step 4: AI response must offer empathy, explain the escalation, and trigger Human Handoff immediately.
suggestedReply: Dear Cleopatra, I understand you canceled your subscription and were still billed $1200. Since this refund request exceeds automated limits, I have escalated this conversation to a Billing Manager for immediate manual review. A human agent will take over this chat to assist you directly.

suggestedActions.title: Handoff to Billing Manager
suggestedActions.description: Mark conversation status as Pending Human and alert the billing representative queue.
